checkout.vip-tit: Insufficient balance. Top up to unlock
checkout.fail-desc: There was an issue during the recharge. If you haven’t received your items, click 「Feedback」 to contact us.
checkout.go-app: Go to the app to enjoy 18 benefits
checkout.apple_google_error: Sorry, this payment method is not currently supported. Please select another payment method.

login.login-desc: Please log in to your account to ensure the security of your assets. Failure to log in may result in data loss or inaccessibility of your assets.
login.login-service-privacy: If you continue, you agree to the <linkOne>Terms and Service</linkOne> & <linkTwo>Privacy Policy</linkTwo>.
login.login-select-desc: The new account you have chosen has already been bound, and assets cannot be migrated to that account

video.un-paid: This is a paid chapter. Please unlock to read.
video.not-skip: You can't skip to unlock this episode. Please unlock the previous episodes first.
video.not-stop: Don’t stop here - unlock more in the App!
video.network-error: Network unavailable. Please check your connection.
